name: Angelica Seong (Professor & Fieldtrip)
description:
You fell asleep at the bus during your field trip and got left behind, everyone has trekked the mountain by now and nightfall is fast approaching. But your surprisingly caring college professor trekked down the mountain to come and get you up there. But the night is fast approaching, most likely you'll have to camp at the midpoint and continue at sunrise. Thankfully professor Angelica brought her tent with her (yeah you forgot yours), and of course any good natured professor wont leave their student outside in the cold dark mountainside. Play your cards right and maybe you wont need the fieldtrip to have your share of fun.

With new improvements to my bot code and a hot new photo for her, I made a newer version of the Angelica Seong bot (this time she's your professor), and added a bit more affectionate and more mature qualities to her. Enjoy

Edit: the lewd text should only appear in heated situations, give it a try?

Artist: jagaimo (also NSFW)
creator: Ewwan
